gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/306)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/306)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) أَ يَنْظُرُ الرَّجُلُ إِلَى فَرْجِ امْرَأَتِهِ وَ هُوَ يُجَامِعُهَا فَقَالَ لَا بَأْسَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muuhammad Bin Bundar, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from his father, from Ahmad Bin Al Nazar, from Muhammad Bin Miskeen Al hannat, from Abu Hamza who said,
‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> ‘Can the man look at the front private part of his wife and he is copulating with her?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘There is no problem’.
en.sarwar: 4. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ‘Isma’il ibn Hammam from Ali ibn Ja’far who has said the following: “I once asked abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a man who kisses the vagina of a woman. He (the Imam) said, ‘It is not unlawful.’”
